title: C. elegans Embryo Dissociation for FACS Isolation and RNA-seq Analysis
author: Robert TP Williams
materials: Prepare reagents in advance L15-10 Buffer: Mix 500 ml Leibovitz's L-15 Medium, 50 ml Fetal Bovine Serum (heat inactivated), 50 ul of 100x Penicillin-Streptomycin solution and 7.7 g sucrose. Filter with 0.2 micron pore filter. Store at 4ºC. Egg Buffer: Mix 29.5 ml of 2M NaCl, 12 ml of 2M KCl, 1 ml of 1M CaCl2, 1 ml of MgCl2, 12.5 ml of 1M HEPES-NaOH pH 7.2 and 435 ml molecular grade water. Filter with 0.2 micron pore filter. Store at 4ºC. Chitinase solution (1 U/ml): Dissolve 5 units of Chitinase from Streptomyces griseus (Sigma C6137-5UN) in 5 ml of Egg Buffer. Nutate the solution for approximately 10 minutes until dissolved. Prepare 1 ml aliquots in 1.5 ml tubes. Store aliquots at -20ºC. Pronase E solution (15 mg/ml): Weigh 150 mg of Protease from Streptomyces griseus (Sigma P8811-1G) into a 15 ml tube. Dissolve the enzyme in 10 ml of Egg Buffer. Nutate the solution for approximately 10 minutes until dissolved. Prepare 1 ml aliquots in 1.5 ml tubes. Store aliquots at -20ºC.

steps.title: Centrifuge embryo suspension at 2000 rcf...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge embryo suspension at 2000 rcf for 1 minute in swinging bucket centrifuge

steps.title: Transfer 10 ul of embryo pellet...
steps.instruction: Transfer 10 ul of embryo pellet to 1ml of Qiazol and store at -80°C for downstream RNA analysis

steps.title: Resuspend the embryo pellet from Step 7 in 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend the embryo pellet from Step 7 in 0.5 ml egg buffer and 1 ml chitinase (1 U/ml)

steps.title: Incubate for 20 min rotating/nutating at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 20 min rotating/nutating at room temperature

steps.title: Resuspend the embryo pellet in 1...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the embryo pellet in 1 ml of M9 and transfer to a 1.5 ml tube.

steps.title: Pellet the embryos at 2000 rcf...
steps.instruction: Pellet the embryos at 2000 rcf for 1 minute in a centrifuge

steps.title: Pellet the embryos at 200 rcf...
steps.instruction: Pellet the embryos at 200 rcf for 5 min in fixed angle rotor centrifuge

steps.title: Attach a 21 guage 1¼ inch...
steps.instruction: Attach a 21 guage 1¼ inch needle to a sterile 1 ml syringe

steps.title: Quench the pronase treatment by adding...
steps.instruction: Quench the pronase treatment by adding 800 ul of L15-10 media to worm slurry

steps.title: Wash away excess pronase from the worm slurry
steps.instruction: Wash away excess pronase from the worm slurry

steps.title: Pellet the worm slurry at 500...
steps.instruction: Pellet the worm slurry at 500 rcf for 5 mins in swinging bucket centrifuge cooled to 4ºC

steps.title: Aspirate 1 ml of the cell-containing supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate 1 ml of the cell-containing supernatant. Keep the pipette away from the pelleted worm debris.

steps.title: Dispense the cell suspension though a...
steps.instruction: Dispense the cell suspension though a 35-micron nylon mesh filter into a 5 ml flow cytometry tube

steps.title: Perform an additional round of cell...
steps.instruction: Perform an additional round of cell harvest for the sorting strain only (Step 21) Total cell suspension volumes: - Control strain = 1ml - Sorting strain = 2ml

steps.title: - Transfer 70 ul of cells...
steps.instruction: - Transfer 70 ul of cells to 1 ml of Qiazol and store at -80°C for downstream RNA analysis - Continue to step 24 - Retain the remaining ~2ml of cells for FACS

steps.title: Resuspend the chitinase treated embryo pellet...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the chitinase treated embryo pellet in 200 ul pronase (15 mg/ml) and 500 ul egg buffer

steps.title: Disrupt the embryo vitelline membrane and...
steps.instruction: Disrupt the embryo vitelline membrane and release cells by passing the embryo suspension through the needle 100 times, generating a worm slurry

steps.title: Visually confirm embryo dissociation by viewing...
steps.instruction: Visually confirm embryo dissociation by viewing a 2 ul sample of worm slurry on a fluorescent microscope

steps.title: On day of protocol
steps.instruction: On day of protocol: Cool swinging bucket centrifuge to 4ºC Thaw pronase and chitinase aliquots at room temperature Place L15-10 and egg buffer on ice

steps.title: Pellet undissociated embryos at 100 rcf...
steps.instruction: Pellet undissociated embryos at 100 rcf for 1 minute in swinging bucket centrifuge cooled to 4ºC

steps.title: Starting material
steps.instruction: Starting material: Worm suspension in 15 ml tube (material generated from this protocol ) Strains: N2, fluorescent sorting strain Perform this protocol on both strains in parallel Note: The volumes for enzymatic treatments in this protocol require an embryo pellet less than 200 uL. If embryo pellet exceeds 200 ul, utilize 2x the embryo pellet volume.

steps.title: Verify eggshell digestion by visualizing the...
steps.instruction: Verify eggshell digestion by visualizing the chitinase treated embryos under a microscope. Early embryos should change shape, and pretzel stage embryos should release from their eggshell.

steps.title: Store the sample on ice until all strains are completed
steps.instruction: Store the sample on ice until all strains are completed

steps.title: Resuspend the worm slurry in 1 ml of L15-10 media
steps.instruction: Resuspend the worm slurry in 1 ml of L15-10 media.

steps.title: Resuspend the worm slurry in 1 ml of L15-10 media
steps.instruction: Resuspend the worm slurry in 1 ml of L15-10 media.

steps.title: Load 10 ul of cell suspension...
steps.instruction: Load 10 ul of cell suspension to a Bio-Rad TC20 automated cell counting slide

steps.title: This protocol should yield between 2...
steps.instruction: This protocol should yield between 2 \times 10^6 to 4 \times 10^6 total cells

steps.title: Dilute the sample to 1 \times...
steps.instruction: Dilute the sample to 1 \times 10^6 \frac{\text{cells}}{\text{ml}} if above this concentration with L15-10

steps.title: Microscopically confirm fluorescent cells are present in the cell suspension
steps.instruction: Microscopically confirm fluorescent cells are present in the cell suspension

steps.title: Pellet the worm slurry at 500...
steps.instruction: Pellet the worm slurry at 500 rcf for 5 mins in swinging bucket centrifuge cooled to 4ºC

steps.title: Harvest the cells
steps.instruction: Harvest the cells

steps.title: Pellet undissociated embryos at 100 rcf...
steps.instruction: Pellet undissociated embryos at 100 rcf for 1 minute in swinging bucket centrifuge cooled to 4ºC NOTES: - This step will separate the dissociated cells from intact embryos - Cells will remain in the supernatant - Ensure your cell type of interest is not lost during this step. - Visually confirm fluorescent cells are present in the supernatant. - Visually confirm fluorescent cells are not present in the pellet. - You may need to reduce the centrifuge speed and/or time if fluorescent cells are in the pellet of this step.
